name: LaZagne
description: Retrieves passwords stored locally by many applications on Windows/Linux. Tool: https://github.com/AlessandroZ/LaZagne. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #196 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map LaZagne output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
